scripts.job:email-triage: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-email-triage
scripts.job:email-triage:dry-run: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-email-triage --dry-run
scripts.job:due-date-planner: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-due-date-planner
scripts.job:due-date-planner:dry-run: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-due-date-planner --dry-run
scripts.job:gantt-drift: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-gantt-drift
scripts.job:gantt-drift:dry-run: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-gantt-drift --dry-run
scripts.job:channel-consolidation: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-channel-consolidation
scripts.job:channel-consolidation:dry-run: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js run-channel-consolidation --dry-run
